steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The critics praised the films as "picture-perfect" and "heartbreaking and inspiring," and fans hope this ______ will draw audiences.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content:
The first sentence praises two Black-led films ("picture-perfect," "heartbreaking and inspiring") — positive critical reception. The blank refers back to "such ______," meaning the praise itself. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — acclaim: enthusiastic public praise; matches the glowing critic quotes exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — ambivalence: mixed feelings; contradicts the clearly positive critical reception. ✗
  • Choice C — foresight: ability to predict the future; the critics aren't predicting, they're praising existing films. ✗
  • Choice D — impartiality: unbiased neutrality; the critics are clearly enthusiastic, not neutral. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
